untranslatable_reason: Base consolidation detection (20-30 day range-bound period) cannot be expressed with available indicators. Donchian channels approximate breakout detection but do not capture the explicit consolidation base formation requirement. A custom indicator tracking price range extrema over a rolling window would be needed to fully implement this signal.
translation_notes: Used dc_upper (Donchian upper band over ~20 days) to approximate breakout above consolidation base. vol_ratio_20 captures volume confirmation requirement. Stop loss set to 4% per original parameters. Exit conditions use price closure below upper band (reversal) and a volatility-based trailing stop proxy using ATR. The signal's core logic of identifying multi-week consolidation patterns is not fully translatable with standard OHLCV-derived indicators alone.
